description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are clad in light gray brick, and the structure features large windows on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light. The roof is flat and dark-colored, with a small overhang above the main entrance and a wooden deck area at the rear. The interior layout is open, with visible living, kitchen, and bedroom spaces, as well as built-in cabinetry and appliances. Landscaping elements, such as green shrubbery, are present along the perimeter, enhancing curb appeal. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with light gray brick walls, large windows, a flat roof, and a rear wooden deck, surrounded by green shrubbery. The design is open and contemporary, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the bungalow with two large windows and a stretch of gray brick wall, as well as a glimpse of the interior living spaces and rear deck.
description_view_1: This perspective highlights the front facade with a large window, the main entrance, and the adjacent green shrubbery, offering a clear look into the open-plan living area.
description_view_2: The rear side is visible here, featuring a white door, additional windows, and the continuation of the gray brick exterior, with the garage area on the right.
description_view_3: This angle focuses on the rear deck area, the flat roof overhang, and the transition from the interior living space to the outdoor area, with greenery along the edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows on multiple sides
